reviews.review_description: people have this thing called "stick drift" its kinda crazy

reviews.review_title: I got noclipped into the backrooms
reviews.review_description: I know this probably sounds fake, but, like the title said, I got randomly sent to the backrooms after playing for about 5 minutes. I'm not sure if this is a problem other people have had, but if you want to test this out for yourself, if you go back in the tunnels behind the red house structure, there should be some kind of a bulge in the wall at a place where the tunnels met. Also, even if this is just something weird that the  developers did to me or something but the game is still really creepy.
